summary: Sealed round: fix the 71 corpus wf divergences (guardedness over-report 49, sort-clash 15, tail 7) in the sealed wf workspace; audit; open-side re-sync + wf_gate confirm

result.impl:
Round 5 complete. Final summary:

ROUND 5 COMPLETE — all 130 tests green (was 74), zero warnings. All work confined to /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/wellformedness/workspace/.

FAMILY 1 (guardedness over-report, 49 files) — root cause was two missing mechanisms in the round-4 decision procedure, both pinned by new oracle probes (scratchpad/probes5, logged in QUERIES.log):
1. Equality-atom guards: after ALL conjunction-reachable action atoms resolve their variables (deep args included, collected before any equality), conjunction-reachable equalities are processed in a SINGLE left-to-right pass — when one side has no unresolved quantified vars, all unresolved quantified vars of the other side (however deep: h(z)='c', k=<y,r>, x++z=y) resolve. Discriminators: (z='c')&(w=h(z)) accepted vs (w=h(z))&(z='c') rejected (no fixpoint); <z,'c'>=<'c',w> rejected (side-based, not unification); z=z rejected. Round-4's "equalities never guard" was an artifact of the x=x self-case.
2. Same-kind quantifier fusion: ∀x.∀y.φ ≡ ∀x y.φ (likewise ∃), applied before the check and in report rendering (oracle prints the fused binder list); no cross-kind fusion. This accepts predicate-expanded shapes (timepoints.spthy).
Variable identity now includes the numeric index everywhere (binder/deBruijn/guards) — binder y does not bind y.1 (probe g5_idx); the accountability translation's primed vars (S.1, #i.1) depend on this.
Corpus pin: captured oracle output for all 71 theories (scratchpad/corpus5_out — none contains a guardedness/QS/FT block), extracted all 684 printed lemma+restriction formulas (incl. generated accountability lemmas) to wf-clean/tests/corpus5/, and added tests/corpus5_acceptance.rs (Unicode-formula parser + assertion that the formula bundle is silent on every one). Plus 6 byte fixtures for still-rejected shapes.

FAMILY 2 (sort/capitalization over-report, 15 files) — grouping key is (lowercased name, INDEX): $x.1 vs x.2 silent (clears the 12 LaraSchmid files), $x.1 vs x.1 reports "$x.1, x.1". Suffix-sort spelling = sigil sort (x:pub ≡ $x, renders "$x"). Variant order = sort rank ($ < ~ < msg < %) then exact name — the only order satisfying both the p20 fixture ($x, ~x) and the issue527 target (~ltk, ltk). Groups sorted by key with a 4-space separator line. Public-names report reworked from the issue527 target: distinct spellings attributed to their FIRST rule, ASCII-sorted, consecutive same-rule spellings merged, groups sorted by key.

FAMILY 3 (tail, 7 files) — (a) Axioms_and_Induction: full-target fixture (checks already correct given faithful AST; divergence is integration-side). (b) lhs-not-rhs numbers right-align to widest index ("   1."…"  10."; ble/mesh/t5_align). (c) issue515: builtin facts match case-insensitively (Ku→!KU( x ), Kd→!KD( x ), OUT/FR→Out/Fr, IN premise legal); normalized builtins exempt from Fact-capitalization and (except K) from lhs-not-rhs — K participates with suggestions (issue527). Lemma arity/mult items dedup per (label,owner,a
result.audit:
Round-5 both-sides similarity audit complete. Findings appended to `/home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/wellformedness/AUDIT.md`.

Summary of the audit (wellformedness slice delta only: `checks.rs`, `pretty.rs`, plus BEHAVIOR.md/QUERIES.log/round5 materials):

- Guardedness (Family 1): the decision — same-kind prefix fusion, action-atom guards, one-clean-side equality resolution, (name, index, sort-class) binder identity — is behavior-forced (merger; must accept exactly what the reference accepts). It converges on `Guarded.hs`'s `covered`/`remainingUnguarded`/`sortGAtoms` semantics but via black-box probes, not copied expression. The two hardest-to-guess behaviors (single left-to-right equality pass, actions-before-equalities) are each pinned by real oracle captures (g5_e_revchain.wfblock, g5_e_actorder). Upstream's `covered` non-unification incompleteness is reproduced as an observation (g5_e_unif), not transcribed. No polarity machinery / `gconj`/`gdisj`/`closeGuarded`/`GAtom` datatype is ported.

- Sort clash (Family 2) and tail (Family 3): grouping key `(lowercased name, index)`, variant ordering, public-names first-occurrence attribution, builtin-fact normalization, subterm ground-RHS exclusion + sorted listing, right-aligned numbering, and the bespoke equation-layout engine (`min(100, 67+nest)` = boundary-recoverable line/ribbon width, not a HughesPJ port) all trace to captured probes or the issue515/issue527/ble/mesh targets.

- Cross-checks: identifier-leak scan and Haskell comment-lineage scan both empty; all report strings are boundary-observable and present in captured `.wfblock`/target files; oracle is the sanctioned compiled HS binary; the 684-formula corpus pin asserts acceptance. No behavioral claim traces to Guarded.hs/Wellformedness.hs rather than a probe/capture.

This round correctly closes the Round-4 equality-guard advisory (the code previously under-claimed relative to the GPL source; it now matches, reached by probing). One inert robustness nit noted (non-blocking, not a copyright issue). No violations found, so no behavioral redo instructions were issued.

VERDICT: pass
result.gate:
All checks pass. Round-5 wellformedness re-sync complete and verified.

ROUND-5 WELLFORMEDNESS RE-SYNC (unit C) — COMPLETE

RE-SYNC (mechanical only, recipe followed exactly)
- Applied the documented path-fix (`crate::{pretty,report,formula,checks}` -> `super::`; `crate::ast` kept) to the round-5 sealed `wf-clean/src` sources.
- Changed in tree: `crates/tamarin-parser/src/wf/checks.rs` (67,493 -> 76,669 B; new round-5 refs: `super::pretty::pp_equation` @1706, `super::formula::pp_formula_wrapped` @1540-41) and `crates/tamarin-parser/src/wf/pretty.rs` (5,635 -> 10,925 B; adds `pp_equation`).
- `formula.rs`, `report.rs` already byte-identical to the round-5 sealed sources; `mod.rs` already the exact `lib.rs` transform (lib.rs module surface unchanged from round-4). `wf/order.rs` (30 lines) + its two `mod.rs` lines (`pub mod order;` / `pub use order::*;`) PRESERVED.
- OPEN-SIDE wf-prep adapters outside `wf/` (run.rs, wf_adapt.rs, pretty_theory.rs, theory_io.rs) NOT touched.
- Fidelity: all four re-synced files reverse-transform byte-IDENTICAL to the sealed sources. All six `wf/` files headerless, 0 `.hs` citations — no provenance violation.

BUILD: `cargo build --release` — 0 errors (3m30s).

FULL-CORPUS WF GATE (419 files, JOBS=6, `scripts/wf_gate_round5.tsv`)
- BEFORE (baseline `scripts/wf_gate_full.tsv`): 348 MATCH / 71 DIFF / 0 SKIP
- AFTER: 411 MATCH / 8 DIFF / 0 SKIP
- 63 of 71 divergences closed. All 8 residual are a strict subset of the original 71 — 0 regressions (no MATCH -> DIFF).

RESIDUAL 8 (kept-and-reported as sealed-checker gaps; NOT hand-fixed):
- esorics23-bluetooth/models/ble.spthy (20) — fact-arity numbered list: HS right-aligns index to max width (`   1.`…`  10.`) + inter-entry blank lines; clean uses fixed 2-space, no blanks.
- regression/trace/issue527.spthy (13) — compound: missing "Public constants with mismatching capitalization" + "Fact capitalization issues" + "Fact arity issues" blocks; divergent "mismatching sorts" body; spacing.
- accountability/masters-thesis-morio/CentralizedMonitor.spthy (7) — missing "Public constants with mismatching capitalization" topic ('C' vs 'c').
- loops/Axioms_and_Induction.spthy (3) — missing "Lemma annotations" block.
- features/auto-sources/tamarin-repo/sapic/statVerifLeftRight/stateverif_left_right.spthy (1) — single missing blank line.
- regression/trace/issue515.spthy (1) — single missing blank line.
- sapic/deprecated/accountability-old/CertificateTransparency.spthy (1) — single missing blank line.
- sapic/deprecated/accountability-old/OCSPS.spthy (1) — single missing blank line.
Families: (a) missing public-const capitalization check; (b) long fact-list right-align + inter-entry blanks; (c) missing "Lemma annotations" render; (d) single-blank-line topic spacing; (e) "mismatching sorts" body text.

REGRESSION GUARD — all green
- tamarin-parser: lib 67 + wellformedness 2.
- tamarin-theory: lib 489 (+1 ig) + oracle_solver 19 (+9 ig) + wf_formula_terms 5.
- tamarin-prover: lib 60 + cli_e2e 7 + console_split_parity 59.
- tamarin-server: lib 107 (+2 ig) + routes (autoprove 6 / basic 19 / graph 4 / proof_step 3 / static 3 / stubs 15 / upload 3). 0 failures.
- gen_license_headers.py --check: 0 stale (exit 0); no wf/ file gained a header. Header delta: 0.

No git commits made. No deletions. Round-5 section appended to /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/INTEGRATION_REPORT.md. Results TSV: /home/kamilner/tamarin-rs/scripts/wf_gate_round5.tsv.
